item.title: Digital Camera Card Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Camera Card Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoveryservices
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Camera Card Recovery
(Utilities)
Data Doctor Digital Camera image restoration software restores erased audio video clips, photographs and previously saved albums from formatted digital cameras multimedia card. Recovery software recovers JPG, JPEG, GIF, RIFF, TIF, TIFF, AVI, MOV, PNG, BMP, MIDI and WAV image files from digital camera memory card. How to retrieve digital camera deleted photo? Digital camera picture rescue utility supports various digital cameras like Konica, Samsung, Toshiba, Panasonic, Canon, Kodak, Nikon, Fuji, FujiFilm, LG, Lexar, HP, Casio, Agfa, Polaroid, Yashica, Kinon, Olympus, Sony, NEC, Imation, Sanyo, Kyocera, SanDisk, Epson, IBM, Minolta, Argus, Sharp, Goldstar, Mitsubishi, JVC, Leica, Chinon, Vivitar, Phillips, Ricoh, Hitachi, Pentax and Verbatim. Digital camera snap salvage tool supports various digital cameras RAW format like Kodak DCR, Nikon NEF, Canon CRW, Fuji RAF and Minolta MRW. Retrieval tool supports windows operating system like windows 11, windows 10, windows 8, windows 7.Features:* Recovery software recovers deleted files like jpg, jpeg, wav, gif, bmp, midi, riff and tiff form digital camera.* Digital camera image rescue utility has read only permission so it does not affect other files in the disk.* Recovery software can recovers data even memory card is pulled out while digital camera was ON.* Digital camera picture recovery software is GUI (Graphical User Interface) based so it is easy to use.* Recovery tools undelete lost files even disk is affected from virus.*For assistance of user rescue software provides help manual to use the software easily.

[read more]
item.description:
Digital Camera Card Recovery
(Utilities)
Data Doctor Digital Camera image restoration software restores erased audio video clips, photographs and previously saved albums from formatted digital cameras multimedia card. Recovery software recovers JPG, JPEG, GIF, RIFF, TIF, TIFF, AVI, MOV, PNG, BMP, MIDI and WAV image files from digital camera memory card. How to retrieve digital camera deleted photo? Digital camera picture rescue utility supports various digital cameras like Konica, Samsung, Toshiba, Panasonic, Canon, Kodak, Nikon, Fuji, FujiFilm, LG, Lexar, HP, Casio, Agfa, Polaroid, Yashica, Kinon, Olympus, Sony, NEC, Imation, Sanyo, Kyocera, SanDisk, Epson, IBM, Minolta, Argus, Sharp, Goldstar, Mitsubishi, JVC, Leica, Chinon, Vivitar, Phillips, Ricoh, Hitachi, Pentax and Verbatim. Digital camera snap salvage tool supports various digital cameras RAW format like Kodak DCR, Nikon NEF, Canon CRW, Fuji RAF and Minolta MRW. Retrieval tool supports windows operating system like windows 11, windows 10, windows 8, windows 7.Features:* Recovery software recovers deleted files like jpg, jpeg, wav, gif, bmp, midi, riff and tiff form digital camera.* Digital camera image rescue utility has read only permission so it does not affect other files in the disk.* Recovery software can recovers data even memory card is pulled out while digital camera was ON.* Digital camera picture recovery software is GUI (Graphical User Interface) based so it is easy to use.* Recovery tools undelete lost files even disk is affected from virus.*For assistance of user rescue software provides help manual to use the software easily.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Digital Camera Card Recovery
(Utilities)
Data Doctor Digital Camera image restoration software restores erased audio video clips, photographs and previously saved albums from formatted digital cameras multimedia card. Recovery software recovers JPG, JPEG, GIF, RIFF, TIF, TIFF, AVI, MOV, PNG, BMP, MIDI and WAV image files from digital camera memory card. How to retrieve digital camera deleted photo? Digital camera picture rescue utility supports various digital cameras like Konica, Samsung, Toshiba, Panasonic, Canon, Kodak, Nikon, Fuji, FujiFilm, LG, Lexar, HP, Casio, Agfa, Polaroid, Yashica, Kinon, Olympus, Sony, NEC, Imation, Sanyo, Kyocera, SanDisk, Epson, IBM, Minolta, Argus, Sharp, Goldstar, Mitsubishi, JVC, Leica, Chinon, Vivitar, Phillips, Ricoh, Hitachi, Pentax and Verbatim. Digital camera snap salvage tool supports various digital cameras RAW format like Kodak DCR, Nikon NEF, Canon CRW, Fuji RAF and Minolta MRW. Retrieval tool supports windows operating system like windows 11, windows 10, windows 8, windows 7.Features:* Recovery software recovers deleted files like jpg, jpeg, wav, gif, bmp, midi, riff and tiff form digital camera.* Digital camera image rescue utility has read only permission so it does not affect other files in the disk.* Recovery software can recovers data even memory card is pulled out while digital camera was ON.* Digital camera picture recovery software is GUI (Graphical User Interface) based so it is easy to use.* Recovery tools undelete lost files even disk is affected from virus.*For assistance of user rescue software provides help manual to use the software easily.

[read more]

item.title: Memory Card Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Memory Card Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recoverdatafile
item.itunes:summary:
Memory Card Recovery
(Utilities)
Memory card files recovery software restore lost, missing, crashed files and folders from memory card digital storage media. MMC card data recovery utility support recovery from all type of USB storage media of all capacities including 16 GB, 32GB, 64 GB, 128 GB, 256 GB, 512 GB and higher capacity drives. Flash memory card data recovery application recovers lost, deleted pictures, images, audio, video songs from corrupted SDHC memory cards. Smart media files backup software retrieve data even when error messages like Drive not formatted is displayed on the screen while accessing the memory card. Memory card data recovery software support to all memory card manufacturers including Kodak, Nikon, Canon, SanDisk, Casio, Sony and Kingston etc. XD Memory card photo rescue tool bring back files deleted using (shift+delete) command or lost due to formatted memory card. Flash memory card files retrieval utility is compatible with all Windows operating system including Windows 11,Win 10,Win 8 operating system.Software provides user friendly interface to easily understand working of multimedia storage card. Tool recover data in case file not formatted or disk not accessible error message is displayed while accessing multimedia card on your PC or Laptop Desktop system. Memory card files recovery software provides preview of all recovered files and folders before actual recovery.Features: *Memory card data recovery software recovers lost data even after logical corruption and accidental deletion from memory card storage device. * Software supports all major USB memory card reader. * Utility support various memory card storage drives such as 16 GB, 32GB, 64 GB, 128 GB, 256 GB, 512 GB and higher capacity drives. *Software is designed with interactive graphical user interface that helps user in most efficient way.

[read more]

Memory Card Recovery
(Utilities)
Memory card files recovery software restore lost, missing, crashed files and folders from memory card digital storage media. MMC card data recovery utility support recovery from all type of USB storage media of all capacities including 16 GB, 32GB, 64 GB, 128 GB, 256 GB, 512 GB and higher capacity drives. Flash memory card data recovery application recovers lost, deleted pictures, images, audio, video songs from corrupted SDHC memory cards. Smart media files backup software retrieve data even when error messages like Drive not formatted is displayed on the screen while accessing the memory card. Memory card data recovery software support to all memory card manufacturers including Kodak, Nikon, Canon, SanDisk, Casio, Sony and Kingston etc. XD Memory card photo rescue tool bring back files deleted using (shift+delete) command or lost due to formatted memory card. Flash memory card files retrieval utility is compatible with all Windows operating system including Windows 11,Win 10,Win 8 operating system.Software provides user friendly interface to easily understand working of multimedia storage card. Tool recover data in case file not formatted or disk not accessible error message is displayed while accessing multimedia card on your PC or Laptop Desktop system. Memory card files recovery software provides preview of all recovered files and folders before actual recovery.Features: *Memory card data recovery software recovers lost data even after logical corruption and accidental deletion from memory card storage device. * Software supports all major USB memory card reader. * Utility support various memory card storage drives such as 16 GB, 32GB, 64 GB, 128 GB, 256 GB, 512 GB and higher capacity drives. *Software is designed with interactive graphical user interface that helps user in most efficient way.

[read more]

Memory Card Recovery
(Utilities)
Memory card files recovery software restore lost, missing, crashed files and folders from memory card digital storage media. MMC card data recovery utility support recovery from all type of USB storage media of all capacities including 16 GB, 32GB, 64 GB, 128 GB, 256 GB, 512 GB and higher capacity drives. Flash memory card data recovery application recovers lost, deleted pictures, images, audio, video songs from corrupted SDHC memory cards. Smart media files backup software retrieve data even when error messages like Drive not formatted is displayed on the screen while accessing the memory card. Memory card data recovery software support to all memory card manufacturers including Kodak, Nikon, Canon, SanDisk, Casio, Sony and Kingston etc. XD Memory card photo rescue tool bring back files deleted using (shift+delete) command or lost due to formatted memory card. Flash memory card files retrieval utility is compatible with all Windows operating system including Windows 11,Win 10,Win 8 operating system.Software provides user friendly interface to easily understand working of multimedia storage card. item.title: Softaken Merge Vcard Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Softaken Merge Vcard Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: fileconversion
item.itunes:summary:
Softaken Merge Vcard Tool
(Utilities)
Utilize the Softaken Merge VCF Tool to quickly and effortlessly combine multiple VCF contacts into one. Users can utilize this software on any Windows OS version, whether it's the latest or the oldest. There are users who can select up to multiple VCF contacts at one time. There is no need to download multiple tools to combine VCF contacts. Both technical and non-technical users can also use the tool to consolidate VCF contacts. There is no need for technical knowledge to join VCF contacts. Get the latest free trial edition of this software to learn more about its features.
Read More: https://www.softaken.com/merge-vcard-pro
[read more]
item.description:

There is no need for technical knowledge to join VCF contacts. Get the latest free trial edition of this software to learn more about its features.

[read more]

Softaken Merge Vcard Tool
(Utilities)
Utilize the Softaken Merge VCF Tool to quickly and effortlessly combine multiple VCF contacts into one. Users can utilize this software on any Windows OS version, whether it's the latest or the oldest. There are users who can select up to multiple VCF contacts at one time. There is no need to download multiple tools to combine VCF contacts. Both technical and non-technical users can also use the tool to consolidate VCF contacts. There is no need for technical knowledge to join VCF contacts. Get the latest free trial edition of this software to learn more about its features.
Read More: https://www.softaken.com/merge-vcard-pro
[read more]

item.title: MSSQL To MySQL Converter ex [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: MSSQL To MySQL Converter ex [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoveryservices
item.itunes:summary:
MSSQL To MySQL Converter ex
(Utilities)
MSSQL database migration tool converts complete or selected MS SQL database table row column records into MySQL db server records and retain data types, attributes, primary, null and default values, unique and foreign key constraints, triggers, entities, indexes and properties. Database conversion application provides facility to overwrite the existing database with the converted db or to save the new database at user specified location for the future reference and provides Unicode architecture and multilingual support. Read only and non destructive mode supporting Microsoft SQL to MySQL db migration software maintains data integrity, synchronization, reliability and security features of the database. MS SQL db converter application prevents data loss during migration process and provides GUI look that is graphical user interface for the help and support of users. Database migration program works in a systematic manner and it is cost effective as well as efficient and does not require any special or extra technical skills for the software operation. Db migration application is easily compatible with windows 11, windows 10, windows 8, windows 7 and provides install and uninstall support. Microsoft SQL database conversion software contains internal help manuals and guides for the help, convenience and support of users.MSSQL to MySQL database conversion software Features:*Microsoft SQL to MySQL db conversion utility provides support to all latest major versions of MSSQL database server.*MS SQL to MySQL database converter application is compatible with windows11, windows 10, windows 8, windows 7 operating systems.*MSSQL database migration tool provides facility to save the converted database either with the existing one or at user specified location for the future reference.*Microsoft SQL database conversion software prevents data loss during migration process.

[read more]
item.description:
MSSQL To MySQL Converter ex
(Utilities)
MSSQL database migration tool converts complete or selected MS SQL database table row column records into MySQL db server records and retain data types, attributes, primary, null and default values, unique and foreign key constraints, triggers, entities, indexes and properties. Database conversion application provides facility to overwrite the existing database with the converted db or to save the new database at user specified location for the future reference and provides Unicode architecture and multilingual support. [read more]

MSSQL To MySQL Converter ex
(Utilities)
MSSQL database migration tool converts complete or selected MS SQL database table row column records into MySQL db server records and retain data types, attributes, primary, null and default values, unique and foreign key constraints, triggers, entities, indexes and properties. Database conversion application provides facility to overwrite the existing database with the converted db or to save the new database at user specified location for the future reference and provides Unicode architecture and multilingual support. Read only and non destructive mode supporting Microsoft SQL to MySQL db migration software maintains data integrity, synchronization, reliability and security features of the database. MS SQL db converter application prevents data loss during migration process and provides GUI look that is graphical user interface for the help and support of users. Database migration program works in a systematic manner and it is cost effective as well as efficient and does not require any special or extra technical skills for the software operation. Db migration application is easily compatible with windows 11, windows 10, windows 8, windows 7 and provides install and uninstall support. Microsoft SQL database conversion software contains internal help manuals and guides for the help, convenience and support of users.MSSQL to MySQL database conversion software Features:*Microsoft SQL to MySQL db conversion utility provides support to all latest major versions of MSSQL database server.*MS SQL to MySQL database converter application is compatible with windows11, windows 10, windows 8, windows 7 operating systems.*MSSQL database migration tool provides facility to save the converted database either with the existing one or at user specified location for the future reference.*Microsoft SQL database conversion software prevents data loss during migration process.

item.title: QmidiCtl [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: QmidiCtl [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: rncbc
item.itunes:summary:
QmidiCtl
(Music Production)
QmidiCtl is a MIDI remote controller application that sends MIDI data over the network, using UDP/IP multicast. Inspired by multimidicast (https://llg.cubic.org/tools) and designed to be compatible with ipMIDI for Windows (https://nerds.de).
QmidiCtl has been primarily designed for the Maemo enabled handheld devices, namely the Nokia N900 and also being promoted to the Maemo Package repositories. Nevertheless, QmidiCtl may still be found effective as a regular desktop application and as an Android application as well.

QmidiCtl is free, open-source software, distributed under the terms of the GNU General Public License (GPL) version 2 or later.

Sourceforge project page: https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmidictl

Weblog: https://www.rncbc.org

See also: QmidiNet - A MIDI network gateway via UDP/IP multicast
https://qmidinet.sourceforge.io
[read more]
item.description:
QmidiCtl
(Music Production)
QmidiCtl is a MIDI remote controller application that sends MIDI data over the network, using UDP/IP multicast. Inspired by multimidicast (https://llg.cubic.org/tools) and designed to be compatible with ipMIDI for Windows (https://nerds.de).
QmidiCtl has been primarily designed for the Maemo enabled handheld devices, namely the Nokia N900 and also being promoted to the Maemo Package repositories. Nevertheless, QmidiCtl may still be found effective as a regular desktop application and as an Android application as well.

QmidiCtl is free, open-source software, distributed under the terms of the GNU General Public License (GPL) version 2 or later.

Sourceforge project page: https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmidictl

Weblog: https://www.rncbc.org

See also: QmidiNet - A MIDI network gateway via UDP/IP multicast
https://qmidinet.sourceforge.io
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
QmidiCtl
(Music Production)
QmidiCtl is a MIDI remote controller application that sends MIDI data over the network, using UDP/IP multicast. Inspired by multimidicast (https://llg.cubic.org/tools) and designed to be compatible with ipMIDI for Windows (https://nerds.de).
QmidiCtl has been primarily designed for the Maemo enabled handheld devices, namely the Nokia N900 and also being promoted to the Maemo Package repositories. Nevertheless, QmidiCtl may still be found effective as a regular desktop application and as an Android application as well.

QmidiCtl is free, open-source software, distributed under the terms of the GNU General Public License (GPL) version 2 or later.

Sourceforge project page: https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmidictl

Weblog: https://www.rncbc.org

See also: QmidiNet - A MIDI network gateway via UDP/IP multicast
https://qmidinet.sourceforge.io
[read more]

item.title: QXGEdit [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: QXGEdit [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: rncbc
item.itunes:summary:
QXGEdit
(Music Production)
QXGEdit is a Qt GUI for editing MIDI System Exclusive files for XG devices (eg. Yamaha DB50XG).

[read more]
item.description:

(Music Production)
QXGEdit is a Qt GUI for editing MIDI System Exclusive files for XG devices (eg. Yamaha DB50XG).

(Music Production)

[read more]

item.title: Qsynth [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: Qsynth [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: rncbc
item.itunes:summary:
Qsynth
(Music Production)
Qsynth is a FluidSynth GUI front-end application written in C++ around the Qt framework using Qt Designer. FluidSynth is an excellent command line software synthesizer based on the Soundfont specification.

[read more]
item.description:
Qsynth
(Music Production)
Qsynth is a FluidSynth GUI front-end application written in C++ around the Qt framework using Qt Designer. FluidSynth is an excellent command line software synthesizer based on the Soundfont specification.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Qsynth
(Music Production)
Qsynth is a FluidSynth GUI front-end application written in C++ around the Qt framework using Qt Designer. FluidSynth is an excellent command line software synthesizer based on the Soundfont specification.

[read more]

item.title: QjackCtl [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: QjackCtl [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: rncbc
item.itunes:summary:
QjackCtl
(Music Production)
QjackCtl is a simple Qt application to control the JACK sound server daemon, specific for the Linux Audio Desktop infrastructure.
Written in C++ around the Qt framework for X11, most exclusively using Qt Designer.

Provides a simple GUI dialog for setting several JACK daemon parameters, which are properly saved between sessions, and a way control of the status of the audio server daemon. With time, this primordial interface has become richer by including a enhanced patchbay and connection control features.
[read more]
item.description:
QjackCtl
(Music Production)
QjackCtl is a simple Qt application to control the JACK sound server daemon, specific for the Linux Audio Desktop infrastructure.
Written in C++ around the Qt framework for X11, most exclusively using Qt Designer.

Provides a simple GUI dialog for setting several JACK daemon parameters, which are properly saved between sessions, and a way control of the status of the audio server daemon. With time, this primordial interface has become richer by including a enhanced patchbay and connection control features.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
QjackCtl
(Music Production)
QjackCtl is a simple Qt application to control the JACK sound server daemon, specific for the Linux Audio Desktop infrastructure.
Written in C++ around the Qt framework for X11, most exclusively using Qt Designer.

Provides a simple GUI dialog for setting several JACK daemon parameters, which are properly saved between sessions, and a way control of the status of the audio server daemon. With time, this primordial interface has become richer by including a enhanced patchbay and connection control features.
[read more]

item.title: USB Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: USB Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recoverdatafile
item.itunes:summary:
USB Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Useful USB Data Recovery software has feature to retrieve accidently formatted crucial files or folders from external mass storage drive at an affordable cost. Outstanding file recovery application rescue missing or deleted multimedia files from inaccessible jump drive. Unbeatable USB Data Recovery utility has feature to recover virus infected text files, pictures or video clips from flash drives without any special skills. Powerful file recovery program recovers logically corrupted text data, audio songs or photographs from pen drives due to human error. Highly advanced data recovery software for usb storage devices has facility to retrieve corrupted or lost major media files in an easy way. USB Data Recovery application can be downloaded from website www.001micron.com retrieves all major types of documents from any usb data storage devices without any expert help. Advanced usb file recovery software has facility to support all kinds of USB drive brands product including Hp, Kingston, Sony, SanDisk, Transcend, Nikon, Super Flash and so on without any technical supervision. Extraordinary USB Data Recovery software restores wrongly deleted pictures, video clips or mp3 songs from key chain drives in few mouse clicks. Easy to use data recovery program for recovering inaccessible text documents from corrupted pen drives. FEATURE: *User friendly file recovery application restores logically corrupted all major media files from usb mass storage devices without any special skills. * Use advanced USB Data Recovery program for recovering missing or lost text files, audio songs, video clippings etc from pen drives at an affordable cost. *Website provide file recovery software for retrieving virus infected multimedia files from pen drives, key chain drives or memory sticks in single click.

[read more]
item.description:

[read more]
